response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform experience; their work is primarily in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with only brief, non-leadership C++ exposure in early roles, and no evidence of leading cloud compute platforms or mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across languages and domains
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical mentoring through workshops
Proven experience in distributed systems and CI/CD infrastructure
concerns: Only minimal C++ experience, far below the 8-year minimum requirement
No evidence of leading cloud compute platforms or large-scale distributed systems at scale
Lacks documented technical leadership in cloud or DevOps engineering roles
